g.text: Density of the light's recorded (x, z) position per behaviour mode across the V6.5 window (82K ticks, Mar 15–17). Idle lives at the panel centre (x=−159, z=−1); engaged and crowd pull forward (z=+8 and +14) and outward — the light physically approaches the street when it's with people.
